overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long SBET Daily Target ETF (SBTU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of SharpLink Gaming, Inc. stock (ticker: SBET), less fees, and expenses SBTU was launched on Oct 21, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.
